title: Winnipeg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Winnipeg, with a Z-Score of -4.89. This event has a critical level of 10.0/10.
body:
The current conditions in Winnipeg are extremely cold, with a high demand for heating. 
 The temperature is well below average, with a significant impact on daily life. 
 The humidity is moderate at 62%, and the wind speed is 8.3 km/h, making the cold feel even more intense.
